positive: Retro synthwave landscape featuring a neon grid receding into a vibrant magenta and cyan sunset. Includes stylized palm trees and a futuristic sports car silhouette. Vector art style, 1980s vaporwave aesthetic, high contrast, minimal detail, suitable for a poster print.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, grunge, sepia tone
